name: Amonkhet

draft.notes: If a foil appears it displaces a common and appears after the rare. Common foils appear 1 in every 8 packs. Full-art lands appear in 1 of 4 packs; punch cards in 1 of 4 packs.

statedRates: Masterpieces (Amonkhet Invocations) 1:1935 cards. Common foils 1 in 8 packs.
sourceNotes: Large set. 30 masterpieces, four basic land variations. 36 packs per box. Printed in USA and Belgium.
